meta.homeTitle: Pricentrix — Price Intelligence for Ecommerce & Retail
meta.homeDescription: Visualize competitor prices, map equivalent products, and optimize your margins with real market data.
meta.blogDescription: Articles on pricing strategy, ecommerce, and competitive intelligence.
meta.contactDescription: Request a demo or get in touch to learn how Pricentrix can help your team.

hero.title: Analyze your competitors' prices and optimize your own
hero.description: Pricentrix helps you visualize competitor prices, map comparable products, and detect where you're too expensive, too cheap, or right where you need to be.

problem.title: Why monitoring competitor prices is no longer optional
problem.description: In ecommerce and retail, prices change constantly. Without continuous competitive monitoring, you can end up charging less than the market allows — or pricing yourself out entirely.
problem.item1: You're selling cheaper than necessary (losing margin)
problem.item3: Comparing products across competitors is hard and unclear
problem.item4: Manual price reviews don't scale as your catalog grows
problem.item5: You spot problems after they've already hurt your results

solution.title: Pricentrix turns competitive monitoring into actionable decisions
solution.p1: The platform brings together three key pieces of pricing work: seeing competitor prices, mapping equivalent products, and analyzing your market position.
solution.p2: It first captures product and price data. Then it helps you identify which competitor product matches yours. Finally, it turns that comparison into clear reports so you can decide with confidence.
solution.p3: The result: less guesswork, less manual work, and more clarity to adjust prices with a real commercial rationale.

benefits.title: Benefits that translate into business results
benefits.description: The value of Pricentrix lies in helping you find the right balance between competitiveness and profitability.
benefits.b1Desc: When you optimize margins by product, you turn pricing decisions into higher, more sustainable revenue.
benefits.b2Title: Stop losing sales to high prices
benefits.b2Desc: If you're well above the market, customers may choose a competitor before reaching your checkout or store.
benefits.b3Desc: If you're well below competitors, you may be leaving margin on the table by charging less than the market actually supports.
benefits.b4Desc: Detect relevant competitor price changes without relying on slow manual reviews.
benefits.b5Desc: Your team spends less time hunting for data and more time deciding which commercial action to take.
benefits.b6Desc: Comparing equivalent products with real context lets you act with more confidence in ecommerce and retail.

features.title: Key capabilities of Pricentrix
features.description: Each module solves a specific part of the competitive monitoring and analysis workflow.
features.f1Desc: Get continuous visibility into how your competitors are pricing their products.
features.f2Desc: Makes it easier to compare what you sell against what other players in the market offer.
features.f3Desc: Quickly see which products are priced too high, too low, or well-positioned against competitors.
features.f4Desc: View price differences by SKU or comparable product with much more clarity.
features.f5Desc: See how the market shifts over time and catch relevant price movements.
features.f6Desc: Summarize what matters so your commercial or pricing team can act faster.
features.f7Desc: Identify new references in the market early and keep your catalog competitive.
features.f8Desc: Get notified when a competitor raises or lowers prices so you can respond faster.
features.f9Desc: Within minutes you'll be monitoring prices and spotting opportunities to adjust.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: A simple flow to go from seeing competitor prices to making better-informed decisions.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Select the products you want to track in ecommerce or retail.
howItWorks.s2Desc: Get updated products and prices from your competitors.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Compare your own products with equivalent options from the market.
howItWorks.s4Desc: Identify where to charge more, where to correct, and where to hold.

cta.title: Start seeing your prices against the market with more clarity
cta.description: For ecommerce and retail teams who need to decide smarter, react faster, and protect margin without losing competitiveness.

footer.tagline: Price intelligence for ecommerce and retail teams who want to compete with more clarity, speed, and better decisions.
